Page No.-35, Easy
112. Hypocotyl terminates in-
A) Plumule
B) Radicle
C) Root tip
D) More than one option is correct
Page No.-35, Easy
113. (i) In dicot embryo, root tip is covered by
root cap.
(ii) In dicot embryo, scutellum is situated
towards one side of embryonal axis,
(iii) Cylindrical portion below the level of
cotyledons is hypocotyl in dicots embryo.
(iv) In dicot embryo, epicotyl terminates
with stem tip.
How many of the above statements is
incorrect?
A) Zero B} One
C) Two D) Three
Page No.-35, Easy

A) Cotyledon B) Root tip
C) Epiblast D) Shot tip
